title: Tofu Stew in Rich Brown Sauce
description: A hearty and comforting tofu stew with a rich brown sauce, inspired by Chinese cuisine. This dish is perfect for a cozy evening dinner.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: Extra-firm, drained, and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the tofu and cook for 2-3 minutes, until golden brown on all sides.
Pour in the vegetable broth, brown sugar, soy sauce, and rice wine or dry sherry.
Stir to combine and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 10-15 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the cornstarch and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened to your liking.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
